name: gnome-window-particles
description: GNOME Shell extension that displays satisfying particle effects when closing windows
author: Yoz

changes.0.1.3: Add particle scaling system - particles now grow/shrink during animation, enabling smoke effects to expand and explosions to shrink; add per-effect size multipliers for visual variety
changes.0.1.2: Add global particle limit (max 300) to prevent performance degradation when multiple windows close rapidly
changes.0.1.1: Fix settings initialization and effect type persistence - properly load saved effect from GSettings and listen for changes
changes.0.1.0: Initial release with 5 particle effect types and preferences UI
